properties.name: message
properties.value: North: Moonwell Lake. East: The old listening stones. West: a path only patient feet remember.

properties.name: message
properties.value: The bridge hums after sunset. Nobody knows whether it is wood or memory.

properties.name: message
properties.value: Moonwell Lake. Please leave the silver reeds undisturbed.

properties.name: message
properties.value: Cave of Low Lanterns — sealed until the mountain forgives us.

properties.name: message
properties.value: Eldervale Crossing welcomes wanderers. Walk softly; the forest is listening.

properties.name: message
properties.value: You found Fernwhisper Cut: a cool hidden footpath under the leaves.

properties.name: message
properties.value: Water laps against the old bridge in slow glassy rings.

properties.name: message
properties.value: A cold draft moves from the cave. Something inside answers with a tiny echo.
